title: An Act to Strengthen Maine's Child Protection Laws by Limiting Contact with Violent Offenders
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 8, 2025
last_house_action: 2/25/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/8/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on JUDICIARY suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on JUDICIARY Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
